notes_md:
**chiếu** = a woven mat you put on the floor to sit or sleep on (usually straw or bamboo).  

It’s a noun. Use classifiers like **cái**, **chiếc**, or **tấm** (all natural with this word). Common pairings: **trải chiếu** (spread it out), **cuộn chiếu** (roll it up), **ngồi/nằm trên chiếu**.  

It’s also a very common **verb** meaning “to project/show” (a film) or “to shine” (light).  


Memory tip: think of a movie being “projected onto a mat” — same word, different context.

example.en: I shine light on the painting.
example.vi: Tôi chiếu ánh sáng vào bức tranh.

definitions.vi: Chiếu sáng hoặc phát ra ánh sáng.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He just bought a new mat to spread in the living room.
In the evening, the whole family usually sits on the mat to eat.
Can you help me lay out the mat in the yard to sit and play?
notes:
chiếu = a woven mat you put on the floor to sit or sleep on (usually straw or bamboo).  

It’s a noun. Use classifiers like cái, chiếc, or tấm (all natural with this word). Common pairings: trải chiếu (spread it out), cuộn chiếu (roll it up), ngồi/nằm trên chiếu.  

It’s also a very common verb meaning “to project/show” (a film) or “to shine” (light).  

Memory tip: think of a movie being “projected onto a mat” — same word, different context.
exampleSentences: Anh vừa mua một chiếc chiếu mới để trải trong phòng khách.
Buổi tối, cả gia đình thường ngồi trên chiếu để ăn cơm.
Em có thể giúp chị trải chiếu ra sân để ngồi chơi không?
